name: Log Extractor
description: Extract cookies from logs quickly and cleanly.
long_description:
🔧 LOG EXTRACTOR (Cookies Only)

• Parses logs and extracts valid cookies.
• Skips corrupt lines and sorts automatically.
• Proxyless — no external access required.

💰 Pricing:
- 1 Day: $0.5
- 1 Month: $2
- Lifetime (No Update): $5
- Lifetime (With Updates): $8
- Source Code: $10

🛠 Updates include speed improvements & performance tweaks.
